chunks.text: 1 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI High Court Appeal No.317 of 2023 (Bazm-e-Falah-ul-Ahbab Sultanpur & others Vs. Muhammad Akram Khan & others) Dated Order with signature of Judge Hearing (priority) case 1. For order on CMA No. 447/2024 (urgent) 2. For order on office objection 3. For hearing of main case 4. For hearing of CMA No. 3840/2023 (stay) 5. For hearing of CMA No. 3841/2023 Dated 28.02.2024 Mr. Muhammad Nishat Warsi Advocate for the Appellant Mahmoodur Rehman, Director (VA) Administrator Social Welfare Department for the Respondent.-.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2-5. Ch. Muhammad Abu Bakar Khalil, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of the Respondent No.1 which is taken on record. Mr. Muhammad Nishat Warsi, learned counsel for the Appellants submits that through the impugned order some miscellaneous applications were disposed of without any reasoning. He without further arguments submits that he has moved fresh applications before the learned Judge and since he has attempted to exhaust a remedy by moving fresh applications he would not press this appeal in view of the pendency of the applications for their lawful disposal. Appeal along with listed applications is dismissed as not pressed in view of the above. JUDGE JUDGE Amjad PS
